reasoning_model_1: The model generates the content '社团活动很有趣，大家玩得很开心' with 100% accuracy relative to the prompt. In terms of the paralinguistic feature '节奏' (Rhythm/Pace), the audio is spoken with a fast, upbeat tempo (0.0s-3.0s). The tone is energetic and bouncy, perfectly capturing the '轻快' (brisk/lighthearted) quality requested. The pacing is natural and effectively conveys the excitement of the text.
reasoning_model_2: The model fails the Content Accuracy criterion significantly. Instead of the requested text, it says '社团活动真有趣，大家玩得乐呵呵' (changing '很有趣' to '真有趣' and '很开心' to '乐呵呵'). Regarding the target feature '节奏', the speech is relatively slow and relaxed, lacking the 'brisk' (轻快) energy required. It sounds more casual and laid-back rather than lively and fast-paced. The combination of content errors and feature mismatch results in a low score.
model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It strictly follows the text script and accurately renders the 'brisk rhythm' requested. Model 2 fails to adhere to the script (hallucinating synonyms) and delivers a performance that is too slow and relaxed to be considered 'brisk'.
